category_title: Students who exhibit physical distress and avoidance behaviors (crying, falling to floor) in loud environments
scenario_title: Entering a loud gross motor room and performing sit-ups
minimal_context: The student is entering a loud gross motor room to perform sit-ups on a black mat.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are going into the gross motor room now to do sit-ups on the black mat.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Begins to cry and falls to his knees with his head on the floor as the door opens to the loud room.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please stand up and come over to the corner.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues crying, while scooting across the floor.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's get into a sit-up position on the mat so we can start.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues to cry while in the sit-up position, unable to initiate the sit-ups.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are going into the gross motor room now to do sit-ups on the black mat.

STUDENT: (Begins to cry and falls to his knees with his head on the floor as the door opens to the loud room.)

TUTOR: Please stand up and come over to the corner.

STUDENT: (Continues crying, while scooting across the floor.)

TUTOR: Let's get into a sit-up position on the mat so we can start.

STUDENT: (Continues to cry while in the sit-up position, unable to initiate the sit-ups.)

task.content: Transitioning into the gross motor room and performing sit-ups

context.environment: Gross motor room, very loud as we enter, northwest corner
context.materials: Black mat set up on the floor

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: As we all get to the gross motor room, the aid opens the door, it is very loud as we enter
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Begins to cry and falls to knees with his head on the floor. Continues crying, while scooting across the floor.

behavior_patterns.condition: When moved into a sit up position on the mat
